other_observers: None while I was there.  John Malenich and Jessica Miller obtained good photos of the bird later in the day.
description: Warbler foraging very actively, mostly within several feet of the ground.  Dark blueish-gray upperparts without wing bars.  Yellow underparts.  Spectacles consisting of yellow supraloral and bicolored eye ring (yellow upper front, white lower rear).  Blackish necklace of dense streaks.  No calls heard.
